parsed.rationale: The caption describes the object as a 'Closed Seifert surface' formed by gluing two identical surfaces together. In topology, a closed surface created by joining two surfaces along their boundaries typically results in a genus-1 surface, which is topologically equivalent to a torus. A torus has exactly one hole.
